sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (event_date DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_date;
SELECT event_date, toLastDayOfWeek(event_date) AS last_day_of_week FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = toLastDayOfWeek(event_date) WHERE event_date < toDateTime('2023-04-22 00:00:00');
SELECT event_date, toLastDayOfWeek(event_date, 1) AS last_day_of_week_monday FROM test_dates;
